query:
UPDATE rangeCharts
SET sourceStatus = 'generated_candidate',
    sourcePanelLabel = 'Interpolated — no PDF source',
    dataVersion = '2026-05-13-generated-v1'
WHERE stackDepth = 20
  AND (sourceStatus IS NULL OR sourceStatus = '');

SELECT COUNT(*) as updated_20bb FROM rangeCharts WHERE stackDepth = 20 AND sourceStatus = 'generated_candidate';
